design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Book rides with AI|use_case|people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides|2026-07-05T03:20:10.026743+00:00') → hero=workflow-command-center; components=gapless-bento-grid, workflow-playbook-timeline, source-card-dossier; GSAP=image-scale-fade-scroll, hover-physics. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded animations. Label Sweep & Button Check: primary black pill, secondary white pill verified.
headline: Book rides with AI — compare ETAs, coordinate pickups, and reuse routes

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: A practical field guide showing how Super acts as a personal AI agent to compare ride options, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated routes with a durable computer-use cache. Includes step-by-step workflows, limits, and schema-ready FAQs.
